caption:
Dear MMU Chess Club Legends,

Hold onto your knights and bishops, because our weekly chess extravaganza is charging back onto the MMU Melaka Campus like a pawn storming to promotion! рҹҺү Join us for an evening of brain-tickling moves, epic rivalries, and enough laughter to make even the grumpiest rook crack a smile. рҹҳң

Whether you're a grandmaster-in-the-making or just here to castle your cares away, this is your chance to outwit your pals, meet new chess buddies, and flex those strategic musclesвҖ”all for FREE! рҹ’ё Oh, and if chess isnвҖҷt your only jam, weвҖҷve got a stash of other board games to keep the fun rolling. рҹҺІвңЁ

Event Deets (Mark Your Calendars!):

рҹ—“ Date:  3th Sept 2025 (Wednesday)

вҸ° Time: 8PM - 10PM

рҹӘ§ Venue: MSMR2009, CLC 

Bring your A-game, a sprinkle of humor, and maybe a sneaky gambit or two. WeвҖҷre ready to see whoвҖҷll claim the throneвҖҰ or at least brag about it until next week! рҹҳҺрҹ‘‘

CanвҖҷt wait to see you there, plotting world domination one square at a time! рҹҡҖ

Cheers,
MMU Chess Club Melaka

P.S. No actual kings will be harmed during this event. рҹҳү

Join us 8pm-10pm Wed 17/12/25 at MSMR3005!рҹ’ҷрҹ©·
Together with E-Games Club, weвҖҷll try chess, cards & board games, electronic games (& more!)
Have a lovely time together!рҹ©·рҹ’ҷ

On 5pm Wed (3.12.25), MSMR 3006, meet lovely people!рҹ§Ў
Have fun with our BRAND NEW selection of Cards & Board Games!
LetвҖҷs have a wonderful time together!

<pssst, if you want to drop by & do homework in an air-conditioned room, we gotchu fam, see you there (в—ҸвҖҷв—ЎвҖҷв—Ҹ)>

Dear MMU Chess Club Members,

Exciting newsрҹҺүрҹҺүрҹҺү! Our weekly activity resumes on 2025 at MMU Melaka Campus! Join us for an evening of strategic moves and camaraderie as we explore the world of chessвҷҹпёҸвҷҹпёҸвҷҹпёҸ. It's a great chance for you to make new friendsрҹ§‘вҖҚрҹӨқвҖҚрҹ§‘рҹ‘ӯ and improve your chess skills with experienced players in the club and it's FREE OF CHARGE !!

We'll also have a variety of other board games available for your enjoyment.вңЁвңЁвңЁ

The details of the weekly activity are as follows:

рҹ—“пёҸDate: 15th January 2025 (Wednesday)

вҸ°Time: 8PM - 10PM

рҹӘ§Venue: MSMR3006, CLC

Looking forward to seeing you there!рҹҳүрҹҳҷрҹҳҶ

Best Regards, MMU Chess Club Melaka

Dear all MMU Chess Club Members,

We are proudly to announce that our Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held on next Monday. Annual General Meeting is an important meeting where we will be introduced our new High Commitee team for the term 2024/2025. Besides, you will have a great chance to meet new friends and know about Chess Club upcoming events & activities!

Feel free to join this AGM to know more about Chess Club info

The details of the Annual General Meeting are as follows:

Date: 16th December 2024

Time: 8.30pm

Platform: MSMX 2001, CLC 

We warmly welcome all Chess Club members from Melaka Campus to join this exciting meeting!!

See you there!!!

Best Regards,
MMU Chess Club Melaka

гҖҢ The Multimedia University Chess Club Welcomes You! гҖҚ

вҷҹрҹҺІ Whether you're an avid chess player or just someone interested to meet new people who enjoy board games, the MMU Chess Club is exactly the place you're looking for: laidback, harmonious, and full of fun. Exciting news! The MMU Chess Club Melaka is bringing not just chess, but a variety of board games to the CSRW August event on 27 & 28 August at CLC Concourse! The Chess Club is thrilled to invite all passionate students to apply for the committee positions for the upcoming academic year 2024/2025. As a committee member, you will play a crucial role in shaping the future of the Chess Club and contributing to its growth and success.
